changelog:
- Matrix digital rain background on splash & login screens
- Glitch text effect on EDUPULSE title throughout app
- CRT scan line overlay for retro cyberpunk feel
- New DigitalLoader animation with pulsing ring, progress arcs, and cycling Matrix characters
- Cyberpunk redesign with pure black background (#000000), #111111 cards with cyan borders
- Fingerprint / biometric lock: enable after login, unlock with your fingerprint on future launches
- OTA updates with progress bar
- Monospace JetBrains Mono labels in uppercase
- Inter & JetBrains Mono fonts throughout
- Gradient buttons (cyan→purple)
- Stat cards with accent bar
- Pill-shaped status badges
- Scan sound effects
